bird.name: 侏鸕鶿
bird.summary: 侏鸕鶿（學名：Microcarbo pygmaeus）是鸕鶿科小鸕鶿屬的一種海鳥，棲息於亚洲西南部及欧洲東南部。本物種屬於一種部分遷徙的鸟类，分佈於較北地區的在冬季時會到南方過冬，但本來棲息於南方的不會遷移。2018年11月中，有鳥友在新疆瑪納斯國家濕地公園發現在當地棲息的鸕鶿…

locations.name: 雅西縣
locations.summary: 雅西縣（羅馬尼亞語：Județul Iași）是羅馬尼亞東北部的一個縣，東與摩爾多瓦隔普魯特河相望。面積5,476平方公里，2002年人口816,910人。2011年雅西縣人口居羅馬尼亞的第2位，僅次於布加勒斯特。首府设在雅西。 下設2市…

locations.name: 加拉茨縣
locations.summary: Galați (Romanian pronunciation: [ɡaˈlatsʲ] ) is a county (județ) of Romania, in Moldavia region, with the capital city…

locations.name: 卡拉什-塞維林縣
locations.summary: 卡拉什-塞維林縣（羅馬尼亞語：Județul Caraș-Severin）是羅馬尼亞西南部的一個縣。西南以多瑙河與塞爾維亞分開。面積8,514平方公里，人口333,219（2002年）。首府雷希察。 下設2市、6镇、69鄉。

locations.name: 圖爾恰縣
locations.summary: 图尔恰县（羅馬尼亞語：Judeţul Tulcea，羅馬尼亞語發音：[ˈtult͡ʃe̯a]）位于东欧国家罗马尼亚的东南部，是该国东南开发区的一个县（“县”在罗马尼亚是一级行政区），也是该国最东部的县，濒临多瑙河和黑海，在罗马尼亚的历史上…

relations.subject: 侏鸕鶿
relations.evidence: The pygmy cormorant can be found in the Danube Delta, Jijia Largă Pond (Iași County), probably on Mața, Rădeanu, Vădeni Ponds (in Galați County), Cârja Pond (Vaslui County), at Vlădești on Prut River (Galați County), on Calinovăț Island from Caraș-Severin County, on Small Brăila Island, on Dunăreni Pond (Mârleanu, Constanța County), in Danubian Plain on Parches Pond-Somova (Tulcea County)

relations.subject: 侏鸕鶿
relations.evidence: At global scale, it was estimated that the entire population of pygmy cormorants is 85,000-180,000 individuals (a study effectuated by Wetlands International in 2006) and 74-94% of total population lives in Europe
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: 侏鸕鶿
relations.evidence: Threats include the drainage and serious degradation of wetlands and their associated woodland, water pollution, disturbance, and poaching as well as drowning in fishing nets
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
